Search.Label: sector or subsector search
Search.Hint: Search TravellerMap for a sector or subsector, then create a scene that uses the poster image as the background with a matching Traveller hex grid overlaid in Foundry.
Search.Empty: No locations loaded yet. Try a search like Spinward Marches or Regina.

SystemNotes.Label: Generate system journal notes
SystemNotes.Hint: Create one journal entry per subsector with one page per system, then place linked scene notes on the map using basic world details.

PosterOptions.SummaryHint: Choose the TravellerMap poster style and overlays for the scene you are creating.
PosterOptions.Hint: These settings change the TravellerMap poster used as the scene background. Scale and rotation stay fixed in this pass to preserve grid alignment.

Routes.Label: Show routes
Routes.Hint: Display TravellerMap route overlays on the poster.

Grid.Label: Show TravellerMap grid
Grid.Hint: Render TravellerMap's own grid beneath Foundry's aligned hex grid.

Borders.Label: Show borders
Borders.Hint: Display major and minor region borders on the TravellerMap poster.

SectorSubsectorNames.Label: Show sector/subsector names
SectorSubsectorNames.Hint: Display TravellerMap sector and subsector names on the poster.

Labels.Label: Show labels
Labels.Hint: Display major and minor region labels on the TravellerMap poster.

Errors.EnterQuery: Enter a sector or subsector name to search TravellerMap.
Errors.NoResults: No sectors or subsectors found for “{query}”.
Errors.ChooseSector: Choose a sector or subsector before creating a scene.

Generator.Hint: Generate a seeded Traveller system and place it as a draggable tile on the scene you are currently viewing.
Generator.NoCurrentScene: No current scene is available. Open the scene you want first, then generate the system tile.

SystemNotes.Label: Generate system journal entry
SystemNotes.Hint: Create a journal entry and system page for the generated world. Scene notes are not created in this workflow.

Generation.Hint: Generate a brand-new Traveller system using seeded procedural data and place it as a draggable tile on the current scene. Leave the seed blank for a fresh result, or reuse a seed to reproduce the same system.

Name.Label: system name
Name.Placeholder: Leave blank for a random name

Seed.Label: generation seed
Seed.Placeholder: Leave blank for a random seed

Journals.Description: {name} at hex {hex} lies in the {subsector} subsector of {sector}.
Journals.EmptyTradeCodes: No standard trade codes were provided for this world.
Journals.EmptyClassifications: No trade classifications or route annotations were provided for this world.

Overview.WorldSummary: It supports {starport}. The world is {size} with {atmosphere}, {hydrographics}, {population}, {government}, {law}, and {techLevel}.
Overview.ClassificationSummary: Traveller classifications and notable annotations include: {classifications}.

Profile.PBGDescription: Population multiplier {populationMultiplier}; {planetoidBelts} planetoid belts; {gasGiants} gas giants.

Starport.A: an excellent class A starport with refined fuel and full shipyard support
Starport.B: a good class B starport with refined fuel and major repair capability
Starport.C: a routine class C starport with unrefined fuel and standard repair capability
Starport.D: a sparse class D starport offering only limited facilities
Starport.E: a frontier class E starport with minimal support services

Size.0: an asteroid belt or similar debris field
Size.Other: size code {code}, roughly {diameter} km in diameter

Hydrographics.Description: hydrographics code {code}, with roughly {percentage}% surface water

Population.Low: population code {code}, a lightly settled world
Population.Moderate: population code {code}, a modest settled population
Population.High: population code {code}, a heavily populated world
Population.VeryHigh: population code {code}, a world of very high population

LawLevel.0: law level 0, with effectively no restrictions
LawLevel.Light: law level {code}, with relatively light restrictions
LawLevel.Strict: law level {code}, with strict controls on weapons and behavior
LawLevel.Extreme: law level {code}, with extremely restrictive controls

TechLevel.Low: tech level {code}, broadly pre-stellar or early industrial capability

TravelZone.Red: Red Zone — travel is effectively prohibited

Remarks.An: Anomaly site or special anomaly designation
Remarks.Da: Dangerous or otherwise flagged world data

Notifications.GeneratedSystemTile: Created a draggable system tile for {name}. Move it to whichever hex you want on the scene.

Errors.OnlyGM: Only a GM can create scenes.
Errors.GeneratedContentMissing: Generated content was missing from the procedural sector payload.
Errors.CurrentSceneMissing: Open or view the scene you want to use before generating a system tile.
Errors.PosterStatus: TravellerMap poster request failed with status {status}.
Errors.JumpMapStatus: TravellerMap Jump Map request failed with status {status}.
Errors.PosterStoreFailed: Failed to store the TravellerMap poster in Foundry's module storage.
Errors.SystemTileStoreFailed: Failed to store the generated system tile artwork in Foundry's module storage.
Errors.SystemTileCreateFailed: Foundry did not return a Tile document for the generated system marker.
Errors.SystemTileDirectoryCreateFailed: Failed to create generated system tile asset directory: {message}
Errors.PosterDirectoryCreateFailed: Failed to create poster asset directory: {message}
Errors.PosterLoadFailed: Failed to load the TravellerMap poster image.
Errors.JumpMapLoadFailed: Failed to load the TravellerMap Jump Map image.
Errors.MetadataStatus: TravellerMap metadata request failed with status {status}.
Errors.SystemDataStatus: TravellerMap SEC request failed with status {status}.
Errors.SceneLevelMissing: Foundry did not create an initial Scene Level.
Errors.SceneCreateMissing: Foundry did not return a Scene document.
Errors.JournalFolderCreateFailed: Foundry did not return a Journal folder document.
Errors.JournalEntryCreateFailed: Foundry did not return a Journal Entry document.
